Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionVariable

All Superinterfaces:
IExecutionElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractExecutionVariable, ExecutionAllArrayIndicesVariable, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessVariable, ExecutionVariable, ExecutionVariableExtractor.ExtractedExecutionVariable
public interface IExecutionVariable extends IExecutionElement

A variable value pair contained in an IExecutionNode, e.g. the method parameter int x = 42; will have the variable value pair x = 42. This class represents the variable (x) which is represented while its values are represented as child IExecutionValue instances.

The default implementation is ExecutionVariable which is instantiated lazily by the IExecutionNode implementations.

See Also:
  • IExecutionNode
  • IExecutionValue
  • ExecutionVariable

    Creates recursive a term which can be used to determine the value of getProgramVariable().

    Returns the index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.
    String

    Returns the human readable index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.

    Returns the parent IExecutionValue if available.
    IProgramVariable
    getProgramVariable()
    Returns the IProgramVariable which contains the represented value.

    getValues()
    Returns the possible values of this IExecutionVariable.
    boolean
    isArrayIndex()
    Checks if the current value is part of a parent array.

    • getProgramVariable

      IProgramVariable getProgramVariable()
      Returns the IProgramVariable which contains the represented value.
      Returns:
      The IProgramVariable which contains the represented value.

    • getArrayIndex

      Term getArrayIndex()
      Returns the index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.
      Returns:
      The index in the parent array or null if no array cell value is represented.

    • getArrayIndexString

      String getArrayIndexString()
      Returns the human readable index in the parent array if an array cell value is represented.
      Returns:
      The human readable index in the parent array or null if no array cell value is represented.

    • isArrayIndex

      boolean isArrayIndex()
      Checks if the current value is part of a parent array.
      Returns:
      true is array cell value, false is a "normal" value.

    • getAdditionalCondition

      Term getAdditionalCondition()
      Returns the optional additional condition considered during value computation.
      Returns:
      The optional additional condition considered during value computation.

    • getParentValue

      IExecutionValue getParentValue()
      Returns the parent IExecutionValue if available.
      Returns:
      The parent IExecutionValue if available and null otherwise.

    • getValues

      Returns the possible values of this IExecutionVariable.
      Returns:
      The possible values of this IExecutionVariable.

      Creates recursive a term which can be used to determine the value of getProgramVariable().
